name: 7' x 10' Sunset Moroccan Tapestry Woven Outdoor Rug Coral - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of Middle-Eastern inspired flair with this Sunset Moroccan Tapestry Rug from Threshold™. It features a geometric pattern on a faded blue backdrop for an elegant, vintage look sure to add style to any patio, deck or outdoor space. Its woven design adds gorgeous texture, and a latex back makes it less likely to slip under your feet. It's also easy to clean — just spray it down with a hose.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
